summary: Full end-to-end verification of Stakked after editor refactor (LeftPanel + Inspector + Pexels). Backend 19/19 tests pass. Frontend flow verified: admin login, workspace, new page modal → /editor/:id (no project-type gate), editor loads with data-testid='editor-page', drag-drop from tray creates canvas-el-*, Pexels search returns 20 photos, drag Pexels photo creates image element with pexels.com URL, save + reload persists elements+theme, add sub-page works. No console errors.

ui_bugs.issue: After clicking '+ Add Page' the new sub-page is added to the list but the active page does NOT auto-switch to it. Root cause: addSubPage() in Editor.jsx calls switchSubPage(newSp.id) immediately, but switchSubPage's captured closure has the previous subPages array (doesn't include newSp yet), so subPages.find(s => s.id === newId) returns undefined and no switch happens. User has to click the new page manually.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix addSubPage → switchSubPage closure bug in /app/frontend/src/pages/Editor.jsx line 128-138. Either inline the switch logic (setActiveSubPageId + setElements) or use the updated list: setSubPages(prev => { const next=[...prev,newSp]; setActiveSubPageId(newSp.id); setElements([]); return next; }).
critical_code_review_comments: addSubPage calls switchSubPage(newSp.id) using stale subPages closure → find() returns undefined → active sub-page not switched after creation.
Pexels proxy (/api/assets/search) correctly strips API key from response; verified no leakage in body or headers.
Backend server.py is 502 lines — approaching 700-line threshold; consider splitting into routers (auth.py, pages.py, ai.py, assets.py).
Editor.jsx does document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme') globally — theme applies to entire app, not just editor view; may leak into /workspace after returning (minor UX).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_pexels_admin.py (new — 5 tests for admin login, Pexels proxy, key-leak, theme persistence)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows pass; 1 low-priority sub-page auto-switch bug)

seed_data_creation: Admin has 2 pages: TEST_ThemePersist (from test) and TEST_E2E_* (from UI test). Each has 2 elements including a Pexels image.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green (19 tests). Pexels proxy confirmed working without key leakage. Editor UI fully functional: drag from tray AND from Assets tab (Pexels) both land elements on canvas; save autosaves within 2s; reload preserves elements and theme. Only known issue: adding a sub-page doesn't auto-switch to it (closure bug). Delete/keyboard nudge not retested in iteration_2 but was tested in iteration_1.
